title: Website opened
content:
# Website opened

The MinyangTech website opened as a lightweight hub for documentation and news.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: Website update
content:
# Website update

Docs and News were reorganized, and project information is now easier to follow.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: Some projects paused
content:
# Some projects paused

Several older projects were paused so development could focus on more realistic priorities.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

title: Camera project notice
content:
# Camera project notice

The Camera project page now summarizes its concept, license, and development direction.

title: Camera update
content:
# Camera update

A small Camera update fixed core behavior and added basic improvements.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

title: Temporary development break
content:
# Temporary development break

Regular feature work was paused for a limited period, while urgent fixes could still be handled.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: Nawo Discord bot introduced
content:
# Nawo Discord bot introduced

MinyangTech introduced a Discord bot for statistics, status checks, polls, and mini games.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

title: Update schedule notice
content:
# Update schedule notice

After the exam period, existing projects were scheduled to receive additional updates.

content:
# Standard EULA introduced

A common EULA was introduced for MinyangTech projects to clarify usage and copyright terms.

title: Roblox game service notice
content:

Older Roblox-related services were retired due to policy and maintenance limitations.

title: IXO Engine released
content:
# IXO Engine released

IXO Engine officially launched on May 20, 2026. Please try the visual node-based app builder.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: IXO Engine 1.1.0 update
content:
# IXO Engine 1.1.0 update

Version 1.1.0 added permissions, HTTPS hardening, Canvas features, Asset Manager, Action System, and export polish.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: IXO Engine V1.1.1 Fix released
content:
# IXO Engine V1.1.1 Fix released

This fix release focused on UI fixes, scene handling, asset dragging, vector drawing, and packaging cleanup.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>

title: IXO Engine V1.1.3 release notice
content:
# IXO Engine V1.1.3 release notice

This small release adds instant update application, F5 preview, simplified properties, connector-size settings, an improved network consent UI, and a simplified interface mode.

Thank you for using MinyangTech.

Contact: <support@minyangtech.n-e.kr>
